steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to identify the title of Hurston's first published short story. The notes give it directly: "John Redding Goes to Sea." The correct choice must name that title.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices, confirm the match
steps.content:
Check each choice against the goal of stating the title:
  • Choice A — ‘Zora Neale Hurston's first published work of fiction appeared in 1921.’: gives the year but not the title. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘Zora Neale Hurston's first published short story was called "John Redding Goes to Sea."’: names the title directly. ✓
  • Choice C — ‘In 1921, a short story by Zora Neale Hurston appeared in *Stylus*.’: gives the year and venue but omits the title. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘Acclaimed writer Zora Neale Hurston's first published work of fiction was a short story.’: describes the work's form but never names it. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
